# Empatix

> Empatix builds AI-powered digital products, business automations and internal tools, with fractional CTO guidance from senior engineers.

Empatix partners with operations and product teams to turn manual work into software. We design, build and ship AI products, business automations and internal tools end-to-end, with a CTO in the room.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What Empatix does and who it's for.
- [Services](/services): AI products, automations, internal tools and fractional CTO services.
- [AI Solutions](/ai-solutions): AI capabilities and example applications.
- [Cases](/cases): Selected client work and outcomes.
- [Industries](/industries): Sectors Empatix works with.
- [How we work](/how-we-work): Engagement model, discovery and delivery process.
- [Team extension](/team-extension): Embedding senior engineers into your team.
- [About](/about): Company background and team.
- [Insights](/insights): Articles on AI, automation and product engineering.
- [Contact](/contact): Start a project or book a discovery call.
